languages.text: "Амсанкт — планета в неизведанном секторе космоса, где находятся руины цивилизации технологически развитых ксеносов — посвященные зовут их некронами. В них мы развернули исследовательский лагерь под надзором {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиции{/g}, и приступили к поиску уцелевших образцов ксенотехнологий. И мы их нашли. Один из них и привел к трагедии, в результате которой Нунциус находится между жизнью и смертью, а я разговариваю с сервочерепом". {n}Он говорит это непривычно сухо и монотонно.{/n} "Спрашивайте, {name}, я отвечу на любой вопрос".

traits.locale_text: "Амсанкт — планета в неизведанном секторе космоса, где находятся руины цивилизации технологически развитых ксеносов — посвященные зовут их некронами. В них мы развернули исследовательский лагерь под надзором {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиции{/g}, и приступили к поиску уцелевших образцов ксенотехнологий. И мы их нашли. Один из них и привел к трагедии, в результате которой Нунциус находится между жизнью и смертью, а я разговариваю с сервочерепом". {n}Он говорит это непривычно сухо и монотонно.{/n} "Спрашивайте, {name}, я отвечу на любой вопрос".
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

languages.text: "Amsanct is a planet in an uncharted sector of space, home to the ruins of a civilisation of technologically advanced xenos — the ordained call them Necrons. There we set up a research camp under the supervision of the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, and we set about searching for surviving samples of xenotechnology. And we found them. One of them led to the tragedy that resulted in Nuncius being caught between life and death, and me talking to a servo-skull." {n}He says this in an uncharacteristically dry monotone.{/n} "Ask your questions, {name}, I will answer them all."
languages.original_text: "Амсанкт — планета в неизведанном секторе космоса, где находятся руины цивилизации технологически развитых ксеносов — посвященные зовут их некронами. В них мы развернули исследовательский лагерь под надзором {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиции{/g}, и приступили к поиску уцелевших образцов ксенотехнологий. И мы их нашли. Один из них и привел к трагедии, в результате которой Нунциус находится между жизнью и смертью, а я разговариваю с сервочерепом". {n}Он говорит это непривычно сухо и монотонно.{/n} "Спрашивайте, {name}, я отвечу на любой вопрос".

traits.locale_text: "Amsanct is a planet in an uncharted sector of space, home to the ruins of a civilisation of technologically advanced xenos — the ordained call them Necrons. There we set up a research camp under the supervision of the Inquisition, and we set about searching for surviving samples of xenotechnology. And we found them. One of them led to the tragedy that resulted in Nuncius being caught between life and death, and me talking to a servo-skull." {n}He says this in an uncharacteristically dry monotone.{/n} "Ask your questions, {name}, I will answer them all."

"Amsanct is a planet in an uncharted sector of space, home to the ruins of a civilisation of technologically advanced xenos — the ordained call them Necrons. There we set up a research camp under the supervision of the Inquisition, and we set about searching for surviving samples of xenotechnology. And we found them. One of them led to the tragedy that resulted in Nuncius being caught between life and death, and me talking to a servo-skull." {n}He says this in an uncharacteristically dry monotone.{/n} "Ask your questions, {name}, I will answer them all."

"Amsanct is a planet in an uncharted sector of space, home to the ruins of a civilisation of technologically advanced xenos — the ordained call them Necrons. There we set up a research camp under the supervision of the Inquisition, and we set about searching for surviving samples of xenotechnology. And we found them. One of them led to the tragedy that resulted in Nuncius being caught between life and death, and me talking to a servo-skull." {n}He says this in an uncharacteristically dry monotone.{/n} "Ask your questions, {name}, I will answer them all."

languages.text: «Amsanct es un planeta en un sector inexplorado del espacio que alberga las ruinas de una civilización de xenos tecnológicamente avanzados. El clero los llama Necrones. Establecimos ahí un campamento de investigación bajo la supervisión de la {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisición{/g} y empezamos a buscar muestras de xenotecnología. Una de las que encontramos condujo a la tragedia que atrapó a Nuncius entre la vida y la muerte, y me dejó hablando con un servocráneo». {n}Su tono es sorprendentemente monótono.{/n} «Pregunte lo que quiera, {name}, y responderé a todo».
languages.original_text: "Amsanct is a planet in an uncharted sector of space, home to the ruins of a civilisation of technologically advanced xenos — the ordained call them Necrons. There we set up a research camp under the supervision of the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, and we set about searching for surviving samples of xenotechnology. And we found them. One of them led to the tragedy that resulted in Nuncius being caught between life and death, and me talking to a servo-skull." {n}He says this in an uncharacteristically dry monotone.{/n} "Ask your questions, {name}, I will answer them all."

traits.locale_text: «Amsanct es un planeta en un sector inexplorado del espacio que alberga las ruinas de una civilización de xenos tecnológicamente avanzados. El clero los llama Necrones. Establecimos ahí un campamento de investigación bajo la supervisión de la {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisición{/g} y empezamos a buscar muestras de xenotecnología. Una de las que encontramos condujo a la tragedia que atrapó a Nuncius entre la vida y la muerte, y me dejó hablando con un servocráneo». {n}Su tono es sorprendentemente monótono.{/n} «Pregunte lo que quiera, {name}, y responderé a todo».

languages.text: “阿姆桑克特是一颗位于未建档星区的行星。那里有一处废墟，属于一个技术高度发达的异形文明——圣职者称之为太空死灵。我们在{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}审判庭{/g}的监视下就地建立了研究营地，并着手寻找残存的异形科技样本。我们找到了。而其中一件样本引发了那场悲剧，导致努恩修斯从此求生不得，求死不能，而我落得对一颗伺服头骨自言自语的境遇。”{n}他用一种反常的干涩语调说道。{/n}“问吧，{name}，我知无不言。”
languages.original_text: "Amsanct is a planet in an uncharted sector of space, home to the ruins of a civilisation of technologically advanced xenos — the ordained call them Necrons. There we set up a research camp under the supervision of the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, and we set about searching for surviving samples of xenotechnology. And we found them. One of them led to the tragedy that resulted in Nuncius being caught between life and death, and me talking to a servo-skull." {n}He says this in an uncharacteristically dry monotone.{/n} "Ask your questions, {name}, I will answer them all."

traits.locale_text: “阿姆桑克特是一颗位于未建档星区的行星。那里有一处废墟，属于一个技术高度发达的异形文明——圣职者称之为太空死灵。我们在{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}审判庭{/g}的监视下就地建立了研究营地，并着手寻找残存的异形科技样本。我们找到了。而其中一件样本引发了那场悲剧，导致努恩修斯从此求生不得，求死不能，而我落得对一颗伺服头骨自言自语的境遇。”{n}他用一种反常的干涩语调说道。{/n}“问吧，{name}，我知无不言。”

languages.text: « Amsanct est une planète dans un secteur inexploré de l'espace qui abrite les ruines d'une civilisation technologiquement avancée, des xénos que les ordonnés appellent les Nécrons. Nous y avons établi un camp de recherche sous la supervision de l'{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, puis nous nous sommes mis en quête d'échantillons de xénotechnologie à étudier. Et nous en avons trouvé. L'un de ces artefacts a entraîné la tragédie qui a piégé Nuncius entre la vie et la mort et m'empêche de fonctionner normalement sans parler à un servocrâne, {n}explique-t-il sur un ton monocorde inhabituellement sec.{/n} Posez-moi vos questions, {name}, et j'y répondrai sans détour. »
languages.original_text: "Amsanct is a planet in an uncharted sector of space, home to the ruins of a civilisation of technologically advanced xenos — the ordained call them Necrons. There we set up a research camp under the supervision of the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, and we set about searching for surviving samples of xenotechnology. And we found them. One of them led to the tragedy that resulted in Nuncius being caught between life and death, and me talking to a servo-skull." {n}He says this in an uncharacteristically dry monotone.{/n} "Ask your questions, {name}, I will answer them all."

traits.locale_text: « Amsanct est une planète dans un secteur inexploré de l'espace qui abrite les ruines d'une civilisation technologiquement avancée, des xénos que les ordonnés appellent les Nécrons. Nous y avons établi un camp de recherche sous la supervision de l'{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, puis nous nous sommes mis en quête d'échantillons de xénotechnologie à étudier. Et nous en avons trouvé. L'un de ces artefacts a entraîné la tragédie qui a piégé Nuncius entre la vie et la mort et m'empêche de fonctionner normalement sans parler à un servocrâne, {n}explique-t-il sur un ton monocorde inhabituellement sec.{/n} Posez-moi vos questions, {name}, et j'y répondrai sans détour. »

languages.text: "Amsanct, uzayın haritası çıkarılmamış bir sektöründe yer alan, teknolojik olarak gelişmiş bir zeno medeniyetinin harabelerine ev sahipliği yapan bir gezegendir. Ruhban sınıfı oralı zenolara Nekron der. Orada {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Engizisyon'un{/g} gözetiminde bir araştırma kampı kurduk ve hayatta kalan zeno teknolojisi örneklerini aramaya koyulduk. Sonra da bulduk onları. Bir tanesi, Nuncius'un yaşamla ölüm arasında sıkışıp kalmasına ve benim bir hizmeletle konuşmama neden olan trajediye yol açtı." {n}Alışılmadık derecede kuru, tekdüze bir sesle konuşuyor.{/n} "Sorularınızı sorun {name}, hepsini cevaplayacağım."
languages.original_text: "Amsanct is a planet in an uncharted sector of space, home to the ruins of a civilisation of technologically advanced xenos — the ordained call them Necrons. There we set up a research camp under the supervision of the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, and we set about searching for surviving samples of xenotechnology. And we found them. One of them led to the tragedy that resulted in Nuncius being caught between life and death, and me talking to a servo-skull." {n}He says this in an uncharacteristically dry monotone.{/n} "Ask your questions, {name}, I will answer them all."

traits.locale_text: "Amsanct, uzayın haritası çıkarılmamış bir sektöründe yer alan, teknolojik olarak gelişmiş bir zeno medeniyetinin harabelerine ev sahipliği yapan bir gezegendir. Ruhban sınıfı oralı zenolara Nekron der. Orada {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Engizisyon'un{/g} gözetiminde bir araştırma kampı kurduk ve hayatta kalan zeno teknolojisi örneklerini aramaya koyulduk. Sonra da bulduk onları. Bir tanesi, Nuncius'un yaşamla ölüm arasında sıkışıp kalmasına ve benim bir hizmeletle konuşmama neden olan trajediye yol açtı." {n}Alışılmadık derecede kuru, tekdüze bir sesle konuşuyor.{/n} "Sorularınızı sorun {name}, hepsini cevaplayacağım."

languages.text: "Amsanct ist ein Planet in einem unerforschten Sektor des Weltraums, auf dem sich die Ruinen einer Zivilisation technologisch hochentwickelter Xenos finden ... die Geweihten bezeichnen sie als Necrons. Wir schlugen dort unter der Aufsicht der {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} ein Forschungslager auf und machten uns auf die Suche nach verbliebenen Proben der Xenotechnologie. Und wir fanden sie. Eine davon bedingte die Tragödie, durch die Nuncius zwischen Leben und Tod gefangen wurde und ich mit einem Servoschädel rede." {n}Er sagt dies mit einem für ihn untypischen trockenen Ton.{/n} "Stellt Eure Fragen, {name}, ich werde sie alle beantworten."
languages.original_text: "Amsanct is a planet in an uncharted sector of space, home to the ruins of a civilisation of technologically advanced xenos — the ordained call them Necrons. There we set up a research camp under the supervision of the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, and we set about searching for surviving samples of xenotechnology. And we found them. One of them led to the tragedy that resulted in Nuncius being caught between life and death, and me talking to a servo-skull." {n}He says this in an uncharacteristically dry monotone.{/n} "Ask your questions, {name}, I will answer them all."

traits.locale_text: "Amsanct ist ein Planet in einem unerforschten Sektor des Weltraums, auf dem sich die Ruinen einer Zivilisation technologisch hochentwickelter Xenos finden ... die Geweihten bezeichnen sie als Necrons. Wir schlugen dort unter der Aufsicht der {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} ein Forschungslager auf und machten uns auf die Suche nach verbliebenen Proben der Xenotechnologie. Und wir fanden sie. Eine davon bedingte die Tragödie, durch die Nuncius zwischen Leben und Tod gefangen wurde und ich mit einem Servoschädel rede." {n}Er sagt dies mit einem für ihn untypischen trockenen Ton.{/n} "Stellt Eure Fragen, {name}, ich werde sie alle beantworten."

languages.text: 「アムサンクトは未開の宇宙にある惑星で、技術的に進んだ異星人の文明遺跡がある。{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}そこで我々は異端審問官（{/g} ）の監督の下、研究キャンプを設置し、現存するゼノテクノロジーのサンプルを探すことにした。そして我々はそれらを発見した。そのうちの1つが、ナンシウスが生死の境をさまよい、私がサーボスカルと話すという悲劇を招いたのだ」。{n}彼はいつになく乾いたモノトーンで言う。{/n}"Ask your questions,{name}, I will answer them all." 彼はいつもと違って乾いた口調でそう言った。
languages.original_text: "Amsanct is a planet in an uncharted sector of space, home to the ruins of a civilisation of technologically advanced xenos — the ordained call them Necrons. There we set up a research camp under the supervision of the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, and we set about searching for surviving samples of xenotechnology. And we found them. One of them led to the tragedy that resulted in Nuncius being caught between life and death, and me talking to a servo-skull." {n}He says this in an uncharacteristically dry monotone.{/n} "Ask your questions, {name}, I will answer them all."
